assets.assetName: KayKit Medieval Hexagon Pack - MYB-53 subset

assets.author: Quaternius
assets.intendedUse: Village / campagne pavee POC: single light animated life accent placed off the route.

assets.reviewNotes: Approved for MYB-53 legal/technical POC import only; animation clips must be verified in Unity before any V1 adoption decision.
